reviews.comment:
Iba camino a jujuy en una Dax y el playero al ver que viajaba en esa motito me ofreció tirar carpita en el parque. Decliné porque era temprano aún pero a la vuelta pasé y paré a desayunar. Otro playero y las empleadas del bar me atendieron super. El ACA es lo mejor!!!

(Translated by Google)
I was on my way to Jujuy on a Dax, and when the beach attendant saw I was riding that motorcycle, he offered me some carp in the park. I declined because it was still early, but on the way back, I stopped by and had breakfast. Another beach attendant and the bar staff were amazing. ACA is the best!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCNE1IcGpTbEp5WDAxMk0wRXdXbEZNUjNCZlFuYxAB

reviews.comment:
En Plena ruta 8. Pocas estaciones. Te cobran como si fuera la 9. En este lugar no había ni para comprar un café jueves a las 22 hs

(Translated by Google)
Right on Route 8. Few stations. They charge you as if it were Route 9. There wasn't even a place to buy a coffee on a Thursday at 10 pm.

reviews.comment:
Baños muy limpios.
Dónde tomé el peor café de mi vida.
Y una de las empleadas muy mala onda. Mala atención.

(Translated by Google)
Very clean bathrooms.
Where I had the worst coffee of my life.
And one of the employees was very rude. Poor service.
